title: malva × inodora
intro: Malva × inodora, also known as Musk Mallow, is a hybrid plant of the Malva family, known for its unique ability to produce a sweet, musky fragrance. The medicinal properties of Malva × inodora include anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which are attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of this plant include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Malva × inodora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
